name: scientific-brainstorming
tagline: Guides a multi-phase conversational process for scientific research brainstorming: context, divergent ideation, connection-making.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped conversational skill with no code execution, network calls, or file mutation. Description clearly states when (and when not) to use it, phases are concrete with example prompts, and the bulky technique catalog is correctly split into a verified references/brainstorming_methods.md file. No security or quality concerns found.
